name: jamarq-atlas
description: Local-first operator dashboard for mapping work, GitHub activity, and deployment readiness across JAMARQ systems.

scripts.test:desktop: npm run desktop:build && env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR playwright test -c playwright.desktop.config.ts
scripts.test:unit: env NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning vitest run tests/actionPlanner.test.ts tests/automationSignals.test.ts tests/browserLocalStorageMigration.test.ts tests/calibration.test.ts tests/calibrationWorkflow.test.ts tests/dataIntegrity.test.ts tests/dataPortability.test.ts tests/desktopConfig.test.ts tests/desktopStorage.test.ts tests/dispatch.test.ts tests/githubAuth.test.ts tests/githubCommand.test.ts tests/githubHealth.test.ts tests/githubIntegration.test.ts tests/githubWritePilot.test.ts tests/localGit.test.ts tests/localStore.test.ts tests/operations.test.ts tests/optimization.test.ts tests/planning.test.ts tests/reports.test.ts tests/repoBinding.test.ts tests/requestClient.test.ts tests/review.test.ts tests/settings.test.ts tests/storeRegistry.test.ts tests/sync.test.ts tests/timeline.test.ts tests/vercelIntegration.test.ts tests/verification.test.ts tests/writing.test.ts
scripts.verify:desktop: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:desktop && npm run desktop:make && npm run desktop:verify:bundle
